tools.name: lookup_order
tools.description: Look up one support order by its opaque public identifier.

order_id.description: Opaque order identifier supplied by the customer.

tools.name: add_support_note
tools.description: Append an internal note to the currently selected support ticket.

ticket_id.description: Identifier of the current support ticket.

note.description: Plain-text note with a maximum length of 1000 characters.
